label: cold
groundingNote: something someone can feel in the body, someone can know it when the body touches a thing; {urn:molecule-v0:water|water} [m] can be like this at some times; it is not like something near {urn:molecule-v0:fire|fire} [m] feels; when all of someone's body feels it for a long time, it is very bad for the body
notes: Temperature percept; hot/warm/cool classified transitively over fire [m] and this.
